message:
fix(formulas): resolve Rubocop violations in bv and slb

- Move def install outside conditional blocks (use define_method workaround)
- Use on_intel/on_arm DSL instead of if Hardware::CPU checks
- Use bin/"name" format instead of "#{bin}/name" in test blocks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,44 +12,28 @@ class Bv < Formula
     on_intel do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/releases/download/v0.13.0/bv_0.13.0_darwin_amd64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "9fbf8ad20acd68d283beb26eaeddb93b0dffdb0b9656fae3a77f1f15670f61f0"
-
-      def install
-        bin.install "bv"
-      end
     end
     on_arm do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/releases/download/v0.13.0/bv_0.13.0_darwin_arm64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "78203f34a43b413f4a1043ad062c0e6fd92cc63da4db4d8434ad6d58a39d0846"
-
-      def install
-        bin.install "bv"
-      end
     end
   end
 
   on_linux do
     on_intel do
-      if Hardware::CPU.is_64_bit?
-        url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/releases/download/v0.13.0/bv_0.13.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz"
-        sha256 "f14c7d06b7f6bbbf258e64c1e3d1015c2027e355acb0e97c73e759d436438e4c"
-
-        def install
-          bin.install "bv"
-        end
-      end
+      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/releases/download/v0.13.0/bv_0.13.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz"
+      sha256 "f14c7d06b7f6bbbf258e64c1e3d1015c2027e355acb0e97c73e759d436438e4c"
     end
     on_arm do
-      if Hardware::CPU.is_64_bit?
-        url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/releases/download/v0.13.0/bv_0.13.0_linux_arm64.tar.gz"
-        sha256 "77191ec02f3ce290347b1059162c42d80f95813c396728ab9c3f198fd9dc0308"
-
-        def install
-          bin.install "bv"
-        end
-      end
+      url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer/releases/download/v0.13.0/bv_0.13.0_linux_arm64.tar.gz"
+      sha256 "77191ec02f3ce290347b1059162c42d80f95813c396728ab9c3f198fd9dc0308"
     end
   end
 
+  def install
+    bin.install "bv"
+  end
+
   def caveats
     <<~EOS
       To get started with bv:
@@ -63,6 +47,6 @@ def caveats
   end
 
   test do
-    system "#{bin}/bv", "--version"
+    system bin/"bv", "--version"
   end
 end

@@ -9,45 +9,32 @@ class Slb < Formula
   license "MIT"
 
   on_macos do
-    if Hardware::CPU.intel?
+    on_intel do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/releases/download/v0.2.0/slb_0.2.0_darwin_amd64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "39ecce943d9924c555a97184ea0745751048ca0a9acc8413ee4310afe2e1bed1"
-
-      def install
-        bin.install "slb"
-        generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"slb", "completion")
-      end
     end
-    if Hardware::CPU.arm?
+    on_arm do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/releases/download/v0.2.0/slb_0.2.0_darwin_arm64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "0898545c20c9fe867cfb713e8fe94772dfc5da60dd9eee4a1dcaaffccf86386a"
-
-      def install
-        bin.install "slb"
-        generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"slb", "completion")
-      end
     end
   end
 
   on_linux do
-    if Hardware::CPU.intel? && Hardware::CPU.is_64_bit?
+    on_intel do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/releases/download/v0.2.0/slb_0.2.0_linux_amd64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "9ceed8af0ec18b425bafda9bb6b289e1e42faec8584d84c4fea529fc1ca25597"
-      def install
-        bin.install "slb"
-        generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"slb", "completion")
-      end
     end
-    if Hardware::CPU.arm? && Hardware::CPU.is_64_bit?
+    on_arm do
       url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb/releases/download/v0.2.0/slb_0.2.0_linux_arm64.tar.gz"
       sha256 "ba8d8ad2fdf6ffaf7556c55e5d5283893a8dfe1e30f41fc981fc3e28882e01fa"
-      def install
-        bin.install "slb"
-        generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"slb", "completion")
-      end
     end
   end
 
+  def install
+    bin.install "slb"
+    generate_completions_from_executable(bin/"slb", "completion")
+  end
+
   def caveats
     <<~EOS
       SLB (Simultaneous Launch Button) implements two-person authorization.
@@ -60,6 +47,6 @@ def caveats
   end
 
   test do
-    system "#{bin}/slb", "version"
+    system bin/"slb", "version"
   end
 end
